2604.07590.title: DCD: Domain-Oriented Design for Controlled Retrieval-Augmented Generation
2604.07590.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely used to ground large language models in external knowledge sources. However, when applied to heterogeneous corpora and multi-step queries, Naive RAG pipelines often degrade in quality due to flat knowledge representations and the absence of explicit workflows. In this work, we introduce DCD (Domain-Collection-Document), a domain-oriented design to structure knowledge and control query processing in RAG systems without modifying the underlying language model. The proposed approach relies on a hierarchical decomposition of the information space and multi-stage routing based on structured model outputs, enabling progressive restriction of both retrieval and generation scopes. The architecture is complemented by smart chunking, hybrid retrieval, and integrated validation and generation guardrail mechanisms. We describe the DCD architecture and workflow and discuss evaluation results on synthetic evaluation dataset, highlighting their impact on robustness, factual accuracy, and answer relevance in applied RAG scenarios.
2604.07590.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）廣泛用於將大型語言模型與外部知識來源相結合。<lb/>然而，當應用於異質語料庫和多步查詢時，簡單的 RAG 管道往往因為平坦的知識表示和缺乏明確的工作流程而質量下降。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了 DCD（領域-集合-文檔），這是一種面向領域的設計，用於結構化知識並控制 RAG 系統中的查詢處理，而無需修改底層的語言模型。<lb/>所提出的方法依賴於信息空間的分層分解和基於結構化模型輸出的多階段路由，從而能夠逐步限制檢索和生成的範圍。<lb/>該架構還配備了智能切塊、混合檢索以及集成的驗證和生成防護機制。<lb/>我們描述了 DCD 架構和工作流程，並討論了在合成評估數據集上的評估結果，突顯了它們在應用 RAG 情境中的穩健性、事實準確性和答案相關性影響。
2604.07590.author: Valeriy Kovalskiy et.al.
2604.07590.authors: Valeriy Kovalskiy, Nikita Belov, Nikita Miteyko, Igor Reshetnikov, Max Maximov
